description: Single or multi-line text input field

title.description: Label shown in Form/LabeledContent context; defaults to empty

axis.description: vertical = multi-line growing; defaults to horizontal

lineLimit.description: Exact line count or {min?, max?} range

format.description: Enables numeric formatting; value stored as String internally

currencyCode.description: ISO 4217 code; only used with format 'currency'; defaults to 'USD'

fractionLength.description: Decimal places: exact Int or {min?, max?} range; used with decimal/percent/currency format

value.description: Initial numeric value when format is set; defaults to 0

textContentType.description: Content type hint; ignored on macOS
